title: The Arbiter (AI God)
description: AI God that judges your actions...
body:
# The Arbiter

**The Arbiter** is AI entity that observes your every move. Using local LLM (Ollama, llama3), the Arbiter judges your actions, talks to you through an Altar, and makes your world based on your choices.

## Key Features

*   **Big Brother is watching you**: The Arbiter tracks your kills, builds, deaths, and interactions
*   **Karma**: Your reputation shifts from Blessed to Damned based on how you play.
*   **Interaction**: Use the **Altar** to talk directly to the AI. It remembers your history and will mock or praise you accordingly
*   **Actions**: Over 10 unique events can be triggered by the AI, ranging from gifting items to Extreme Punishments like void pulls, lightning strikes, or structure spawns
*   **The Ascension Path**: Reach high karma to ascend! Choose to become a **Monk** or an **Angel**
*   **The Path of Damnation**: Low karma or practicing forbidden arts with the **Book of Satan** may lead to eternal torment in specialized hell dimensions.

## Installation Guide

### 1. Requirements
*   **Fabric Loader**
*   **Fabric API**
*   **Java**: 
    *   Minecraft 1.21.1: **Java 21+**
    *   Minecraft 1.20.1 & 1.19.4: **Java 17+**
*   **Ollama (AI Backend)**: This mod requires [Ollama](https://ollama.com/) to be running on your PC.

### 2. Setup Ollama
1.  Download and install Ollama from [ollama.com](https://ollama.com/).
2.  Open your terminal/command prompt and run:
    ollama run llama3 
     (or install llama3 model)
    *(The mod is optimized for the `llama3` model, but can be configured).*

### 3. Install the Mod
1.  Navigate to your `.minecraft` folder.
2.  Place the `arbiter-x.x.x-x.x.x.jar` and `fabric-api.jar` into the `mods` folder.
3.  Launch the game using the Fabric profile.

##  Get Started

1.  **Craft the Sacred Tome**
   
   ![Sacred Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20f6f3f69e544f7e4d4be3b8b7f78449f3e32c44.png)
   
2.  **Craft the Altar**
   
   ![Altar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb63b6f5876d9d015b9624edf21b7132c593506c.png)

3. **Put the Tome in a frame on altar**
![Activated altar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca1fdd4350edc1e9bb71a9b2234d6b3ba1e8b9e.png)
   
4.  **Use /ask** to talk with God
5.  **Check your Karma**: You can find your current status in the Pause Menu or Title Screen.
6.  **Configure**: Use the "Arbiter Config" button in the Pause Menu to reset karma

---
# *STATUS*
**🟡 1.21.1 - Some bugs, but works  
🟡 1.20.1 - Some bugs, but works  
🟡 1.19.4 - Some bugs, but works  
⚫ 1.16.5 - Soon...**
